description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a large, edge-to-edge touchscreen display on the front, featuring a grid of colorful app icons and a thin black bezel. The back is a solid, vibrant red color with two camera lenses and a flash arranged vertically in the top left corner. The sides are slim and appear to be made of a dark, possibly metallic or plastic material, with visible buttons for volume and power. The phone's design is sleek and minimalistic, with rounded corners and a flat profile. The screen is glossy and reflective, while the back has a matte or slightly satin finish. There are no visible brand logos or markings on any side of the device.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a red back, dual rear cameras, and a large, colorful touchscreen display. The device features a slim, rounded design with black edges and side buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large, glossy touchscreen with app icons and a thin black bezel.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the slim profile and side buttons, with no screen or camera visible.
description_view_2: Back view revealing a solid red surface with two vertically aligned camera lenses and a flash in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the thin edge and additional side buttons, with no screen or camera visible.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful home screen with app icons arranged in a grid, a status bar at the top showing time, signal, and battery, and a blurred gradient wallpaper in the background.
attribute_camera_placement: Two camera lenses and a flash are vertically aligned in the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on both the left and right edges, likely including a volume rocker and a power button.
